lincs_l1000_ko_note: LINCS L1000 CRISPR-KO consensus tested but unusable: L1000 landmark space covers only ~2.4 program-signature genes/signature and canonical controls were inconsistent (STAT1 correct, TBX21 flipped). Excluded as insufficient-coverage, not reported as a result.
interpretation: Directionally consistent (67%, one-sided p=0.19) on fully arm's-length data; canonical drivers STAT1/STAT3/CREBBP/ARID1A/IRF3 replicate cleanly. Weaker than the matched-context Schmidt replication (rho=0.52) because GEO perturbations span heterogeneous, mostly non-T-cell contexts — consistent with the project's context-specificity thesis.
